about.title: Why We Built Ranjan Tools
about.intro: Every great tool starts with a real-world problem. For Ranjan Tools, the inspiration didn't come from a boardroom — it came from watching someone close to me fight for their dreams.
about.origin1: As a software engineer working in the IT sector, I am used to solving complex digital problems. But one day, I looked closer at the everyday struggles of a very dear friend of mine — a dedicated government job aspirant. I saw firsthand the invisible hurdles that students and aspirants face even before they step into an exam hall.
about.origin2: Preparing for competitive exams is exhausting on its own. But what broke my heart was seeing how much time, energy, and money my friend had to waste just to fill out an application form.
about.struggleTitle: The Hidden Struggle of an Aspirant
about.struggle1Desc: To upload a single document, they had to visit one website to compress an image, another to convert a PDF, and a third to resize a photo. Half the time, the websites were full of sketchy ads, hidden paywalls, or just didn't work.
about.struggle2Desc: When the online tools failed, they had to travel to a cyber café, wait in lines, and pay hard-earned money for small, basic document tasks — or reluctantly ask others for favors.
about.struggleConclusion: Every hour spent wrestling with rigid document dimensions or hunting down a PDF merger was an hour stolen from their studies. Millions of students across the country are fighting this exact same frustrating, expensive battle every single day.
about.empathy1: I knew I had the skills to fix this. Inspired by my friend's resilience and driven by the desire to help millions of others like them, I decided to build a solution.
about.empathyMission: Ranjan Tools was born out of a simple mission: To ensure that no student ever loses valuable study time or money over a digital form.
about.principleFreeDesc: It is completely free. Aspirants should save their money for books and exam fees, not document resizing.
about.principleAioDesc: No more hopping between ten different websites. From advanced PDF management to specific image cropping and ID card joining, everything you need is under one roof.
about.principleSimpleDesc: Built to be so intuitive that anyone can use it, offering full support in both languages so language is never a barrier to accessibility.
about.dedication: This platform is proudly dedicated to the person who inspired it all — my closest friend — and to every single aspirant out there working tirelessly for a better future.
about.dedicationCta: You focus on your preparation. Leave the paperwork to Ranjan Tools.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions from students
faq.a1: Use our Image Compressor tool. Upload your image, set target size to 20KB and click compress. Preview the result before downloading.
faq.q2: How to resize photo for SSC / UPSC forms?
faq.a2: Use the Image Resizer tool. Enter the required dimensions (e.g. 3.5cm × 4.5cm or 200×230 px), upload your photo and download.
faq.q3: How to merge Aadhaar front and back?
faq.a3: Use the ID Card Joiner tool. Upload front and back images separately — they get placed side-by-side on one A4 PDF page.
faq.q4: Is my data safe? Do you store my files?
faq.a4: 100% safe! All processing happens inside your browser itself. Your files are never uploaded to any server. We cannot see your files.
faq.q5: What is the difference between JPG, PNG and WEBP?
faq.a5: JPG is best for photos (smaller size). PNG supports transparency (good for logos). WEBP is a modern format with best compression. Our converter handles all three.
faq.q6: Do I need to create an account to use tools?
faq.a6: No! All tools are completely free and require zero registration. Just open the tool and start working.

footer.tagline: Free tools built with ❤️ for every student.
